task_completion.description: Verify the speed settings are configured correctly and a screenshot is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot named 'speed_settings.png' (or the active Screaming Frog Speed configuration window being saved) showing 'Max Threads' set to 1 and 'Max URI/s' (or URLs/s) set to 2.0. The file should be saved in ~/Documents/SEO/reports/.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom User-Agent is configured correctly and a screenshot is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot named 'ua_settings.png' (or the active Screaming Frog User-Agent configuration window being saved) showing the Custom User-Agent string set to 'AuditBot 1.0'. The file should be saved in ~/Documents/SEO/reports/.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration profile is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Screaming Frog 'Save Configuration' dialog or a file manager/terminal confirming the creation of 'polite_profile.seospiderconfig' in the ~/Documents/SEO/configs/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify a test crawl of the target URL is performed and processes at least 20 URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Screaming Frog main UI. The URL bar should show 'https://books.toscrape.com/' and the crawl progress indicator/table should show that at least 20 URLs have been found and processed.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Internal HTML' data is exported to a CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Screaming Frog export dialog saving 'Internal HTML' data, or a file manager/terminal showing 'polite_crawl_data.csv' successfully created in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog application window should be visible in the screenshots. The agent should not just be using terminal commands to create mock files.

integrity.description: Verify the saved screenshots are actual captures of the application settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image files (speed_settings.png and ua_settings.png) must contain visual captures of the Screaming Frog configuration dialogs, not text files or manually drawn mockups.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV export was generated by Screaming Frog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the 'Export' button/menu within Screaming Frog to generate the CSV, rather than using 'echo' or 'touch' commands in the terminal to create an empty or fake CSV file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Screaming Frog SEO Spider is the expected application. The 'Speed' configuration must show Max Threads = 1 and Max URI/s = 2.0. The 'User-Agent' configuration must show Custom User-Agent = 'AuditBot 1.0'. Expected file paths: Speed screenshot at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/speed_settings.png, UA screenshot at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/ua_settings.png, Config profile at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/configs/polite_profile.seospiderconfig, and Exported data at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/polite_crawl_data.csv.
